overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy game showing a character riding a mount through rainy, foggy ancient stone ruins. The character travels along a dirt path flanked by overgrown grass and crumbling walls, approaching and passing through a large stone archway while encountering ghostly figures and other characters.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown path with stone retaining walls

events.description: translucent ghostly figures appear standing in the tall grass along both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: riding the mount forward along the walled path toward the distant ruins

notable_agents.action: ghostly translucent figure standing motionless in the grass
ghostly figure kneeling in the tall grass

entered.detail: crumbling stone retaining wall covered in moss and grass
weathered stone wall with broken top edge
large stone archway entrance leading into the ancient ruins
tall crumbling stone towers rising above the ruin skyline
overgrown wheat-like grass swaying in the wind

segments.scene_description: The character rides along a narrow dirt path flanked by crumbling stone walls and dense overgrown grass. Ghostly translucent figures appear standing in the vegetation on both sides as the character approaches a large ruined archway in the distance. Rain falls steadily in the foggy, dimly lit environment.

events.description: passing the ghostly figures positioned along the path edges

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the apparitions toward the archway

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the ghostly figures and continues along the walled path. The ruined archway grows larger in the center of the frame as the character approaches, with the stone walls continuing alongside the path.

events.description: text 'Scorched Ruins' appears on screen indicating the location name
other characters visible standing near the archway entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the archway entrance where other figures stand near the threshold

notable_agents.action: figure standing in the path ahead near the archway entrance

entered.detail: orange-red light source visible through the archway in the distance

segments.scene_description: The location text 'Scorched Ruins' appears as the character nears the archway. The stone walls fall away to reveal the arch entrance proper, with a distant red glow visible through the opening. Other characters stand near the entrance as the character approaches the threshold.

events.description: character passes under the large stone archway into the inner ruins

agents.ego_description: riding through the stone archway into the darker interior space beyond

entered.detail: the interior stone surfaces of the archway surrounding the passage

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the massive stone archway, with the structure now surrounding the view on both sides. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as the character moves into the interior ruins, with the distant red glow still visible ahead through the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked path that transitions from an open, ghostly ruin into a dark, enclosed stone passage. It begins with the character riding between crumbling walls and dense grass, where translucent ghostly figures emerge from the fog under a steady rainfall. As the character moves forward, the perspective narrows toward a massive ruined archway that grows larger in the frame while the surrounding walls persist. The scene then opens up as the walls fall away to reveal the entrance to the Scorched Ruins, where other characters stand near a threshold illuminated by a distant red glow. Finally, the camera passes through the massive stone arch, shifting into a darker and more oppressive interior environment as the red light lingers ahead through the passage.
